🌆 Market News Digest
[Jul 14, 2026, 00:00-16:25 EST]

🔥 Top Stories
• US CPI cools sharply — June CPI -0.4% m/m, 3.5% y/y; core CPI flat at 0.0% m/m, lifting stocks, gold and rate-cut bets, hammering yields/dollar
• Middle East escalation intensifies — US/Centcom struck Iran again; Iran hit Kuwait/Bahrain and tankers near Hormuz, while Trump backed a blockade/toll shift to trade deals
• Crude spikes on war risk — Brent ended near $84.73 and WTI near $79.34 as Hormuz shipping fears, tanker attacks and fresh sanctions kept energy volatile

📊 Markets & Macro
• Asia weak on conflict risk — Taiwan, South Korea and Japan equities sold off; Nikkei and Kospi were pressured, while JGB yields fell on flight-to-quality
• US rates reprice lower — Treasury 2Y yield dropped after CPI; Fed futures scaled back hike odds as Goolsbee called inflation “surprisingly benign”
• Funds crowd into risk — BofA showed record “no landing” sentiment, higher US equity overweight, and semis as the most crowded trade

🪙 Crypto & DeFi
• US-UK stablecoin push — Washington and London unveiled a joint roadmap to support tokenized assets and stablecoin innovation
• Crypto regulation advances — UK HMRC set “no gain, no loss” treatment for crypto lending/liquidity pools; US Senate has 24 days left on the Crypto Clarity Act
• Big crypto flow — U.S. moved $288M in seized BTC/ETH to Coinbase Prime; market fear stayed high with shorts liquidated intraday

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy
• Fed turns more hawkish-bullish on inflation — Warsh doubled down on 2% target, independence, and tighter inflation discipline despite softer CPI
• Trade/sanctions front widens — Senate bill would hit Russian energy buyers; US added Iran-related sanctions and Treasury allowed wind-down transactions
• Digital euro / bank capital — ECB picked payment providers for digital euro pilot; Brussels may ease bank capital rules

🏢 Corporate
• Big banks beat, GS standout — JPM, BAC, WFC and C all topped estimates; Goldman crushed forecasts; JPM raised FY NII guidance
• IBM collapses after miss — IBM plunged after weak prelim Q2 revenue/EPS, dragging software peers and Microsoft premarket
• AI/semis keep moving — Nvidia-H200 shipments to China began in tiny volumes; Nvidia eyed Mitsubishi Heavy cooling/energy tech; DeepSeek reportedly preparing an IPO
• Consumer/internet deals — Uber reportedly in advanced talks to buy Delivery Hero; Apple explored PrismML for on-device AI; Verizon and Lucid flagged more stress
